widgets_values: Photography,, The young woman sits gracefully on a plain floor against a bright white backdrop, wearing a form-fitting one-piece leotard with subtle marble patterns and a bold black choker. Her posture is elegant—knees bent, legs crossed at the ankles—with bare feet resting gently on the ground. She gazes upward softly, exuding calm confidence. The lighting highlights her smooth skin tone and slender limbs, emphasizing poise and youthful energy while maintaining an air of serene sophistication throughout the composition.
Photography. A young woman wearing a black suit, standing in a room

Describe the key features of the input image (color, shape, size, texture, objects, background), then explain how the user's text instruction should alter or modify the image. Generate a new image that meets the user's requirements while maintaining consistency with the original input where appropriate.
